title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PRES. CARLOS P. GARCIA PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, FROM SEVENTY-FIVE (75) TO ONE HUNDRED (100) BEDS, AND RELOCATING THE SAID HOSPITAL IN SAN JOSE, TALIBON, BOHOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 841 / 88 OG No. 27, 4272 (July 6, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7483, May 05, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PRES. CARLOS P. GARCIA PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, FROM SEVENTY-FIVE (75) TO ONE HUNDRED (100) BEDS, AND RELOCATING THE SAID HOSPITAL IN SAN JOSE, TALIBON, BOHOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Pres. Carlos P. Garcia Provincial Hospital in the Municipality of Talibon, Province of Bohol, is hereby increased from seventy-five (75) to one hundred (100) beds, and relocating the said hospital in San Jose, Talibon, Bohol.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 14, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 05, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
